name: Dinner + Karaoke Night
description: Start with a sit-down dinner then move to a private karaoke room for the ultimate birthday combo.

defaults.agenda_template:

8 PM – 3-course dinner
10 PM – Move to karaoke venue
11 PM – Private karaoke room until midnight

name: Brunch + Activity
description: A leisurely brunch followed by a fun group activity — axe throwing, pottery or escape room.

defaults.agenda_template:

1:30 PM – Group activity of host's choice
3:30 PM – Wind down with drinks

name: Picnic + Photography
description: An elegant picnic in the park with a roving photographer capturing candid birthday moments.

defaults.agenda_template:
1 PM – Arrive at picnic spot
1:30 PM – Picnic food and drinks
3 PM – Golden-hour photos
4 PM – Wrap up

name: Night Out
